name: Banana and Pear Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin of the bananas and cut them into dice, weighing them.
2. In a preserving pan, add strained lemon and orange juices, diced pears (peeled), and one pound of the sugar.
3. Bring to boiling point, then gradually add the bananas and the remaining sugar.
4. Stir gently; skim carefully and cook for one hour.
5. Divide into jars and seal.
